title: selaginella cumingiana
intro: Selaginella cumingiana, also known as the spikemoss or resurrection plant, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves of Selaginella cumingiana are often used to make teas or infusions, which are believed to provide relief from various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
